Compliance.description: CMS registered medical scheme, AA- GCR rating for financial strength, governed per Medical Schemes Act & King IV, no major sanctions 2025/2026.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.52/5 overall (23 recent reviews), TrustIndex 2.8; mostly 1-star recent reviews.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing with good range (10 plans), low increases, unlimited hospital/PMB; day-to-day varies by plan.

Innovation.description: Profmed app (claims, ER locator, baby program), Amplifire wellness booster, digital assessments; app criticized for poor quality.

Customer Support.description: Phone/chat/app channels; frequent complaints of unresponsiveness, delays despite promises; some positive testimonials.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital app available but glitchy; no security breaches found; regulated under Medical Schemes Act implies POPIA compliance.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R1,022/mo (ProSelect Savvy) to R13,309 (ProPinnacle); 2026 +6.76%

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter strongly negative recent; some positive Reddit/FB; no strong X data.
